scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach(f => { try { fs.unlinkSync(f); } catch {} }); const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; const exec = process.env.npm_execpath || ''; if ((ua && !ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) || (exec && !exec.includes('pnpm'))) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
